body.text: Raised over [c=#81dffb]Super Earth City[/c] to enshrine the [c=#FFE900]Eberhardt Doctrine[/c], the Obelisk broadcasts the Founding Charter on an eternal loop to every citizen within range.

body.caption: SUPER EARTH — viewed from high orbit over Home Fleet

body.text: Every Helldiver who falls on a distant world falls so that this one may stand free. Records are held in the [link=https://helldivers.wiki.gg/wiki/Super_Earth]Ministry of Truth archive[/link].
The orbital shield grid, ratified by unanimous Senate vote. So long as the array holds, [c=#ff8080]no enemy fleet[/c] may make orbit over the homeworld.
Liberty is not given. It is taken, and it is held.
This planet somehow collapsed into a black hole during a [c=#FFE900]counter-offensive to crush the Terminid scourge[/c] once and for all.

body.caption: ***Brilliance was once a major hub for Super Earth's young scientists.. could that have something to do with the incident?***

body.text: A few years later, [c=#FFE900]BRILLIANCE consumed an entirely separate star system[/c], leaving naught but rubble.

This system was torn apart by a supermassive black hole; once referred to as [c=#FFE900]BRILLIANCE[/c]. All planets within the system were violently torn apart after entering BRILLIANCE'S Roche limit, and now this is all that remains of it.

body.caption: ***We had no chance of ever recovering intel from this system.***

body.text: However, visits from interstellar vessels are still allowed; to show all of the Federation what happens [c=#FFE900]when you never take action[/c].

This is where [c=#FFE900]all operations[/c] regarding the**[c=#fa58c2] Ministry of Truth[/c]** originate from; where all citizens are given [c=#FFE900]the unshakeable truth about Super Earth[/c] and the galaxy it holds dear.

If this planet were to fall to the enemy; only Lady Liberty herself knows what [c=#FFE900]horrendous lies they would tell our citizens[/c], and the consequences of our Way of Life's[c=#FFE900] rapid destabilization.[/c]
All that remains after it was destroyed [c=#FFE900]following a catastrophic incident[/c] during the First Galactic War.

body.caption: ***Whatever happened to this planet has been lost to time, due to our inability to recover any important evidence before the explosion.***

body.text: Now; over a century later, the [c=#ff5a5a]Automatons[/c] dare to [c=#FFE900]desecrate this planet's corpse[/c] for what little remains.
All that remains of [c=#FFE900]CELIA[/c] following a tragic, unavoidable incident during the  [c=#FFE900]First Galactic War[/c].

body.caption: ***Whatever happened to this planet has been lost to time, due to our inability to recover important evidence before the explosion.***

body.text: Its remains stay safe here, under the control of the ever-loving [c=#FFE900]SUPER EARTH[/c].
All that remains of [c=#FFE900]CURSA[/c] following a tragic, unavoidable incident during the [c=#FFE900]First Galactic War[/c].

body.caption: ***Whatever happened to this planet has been lost to time, due to our inability to recover important evidence before the explosion.***

body.text: Its remains stay safe here, under the control of the ever-loving
This is all that remains of Seasse after it was exploded following a tragic, unavoidable incident following the First Galactic War.

body.caption: ***Whatever happened to this planet has been lost to time, due to our inability to recover any important evidence before the explosion.***

body.text: It is unknown what the Illuminate plan to do with the remains of this planet. But we must not let curiosity or fear take hold of us. Their plans must be stopped, whatever the cost may be.

A [c=#FFE900]maximum security Freedom Camp[/c]; supplied only with the latest and [c=#FFE900]most effective re-education techniques[/c] to make sure that [c=#FFE900]all dissidents[/c] that pass through here are sufficiently shown the light of liberty.
Additionally, this serves as an important hub for the **[c=#93e8e6]Ministry of Unity[/c]** in this sector.

In accordance with the **2188 "Freedom Derangement Syndrome" Act**, all dissidents must be given [c=#FFE900]5 months' worth of psychiatric visits[/c] to ensure that no obstacle; human or alien, shall prevent all those under Super Earth to rediscover her light.

In unfortunate turn of events, Camp Creek has now found itself chained to the illegal occupation of the **[c=#ff5a5a]Cyborg Legion[/c]**, and now they are undoubtedly corrupting the minds of those poor dissidents stuck there.

_format.note: Per-planet POINTS OF INTEREST. Key = planet INDEX (string). Each planet has a 'poi' array; every entry renders as a Helldivers-style intel card. EMPTY BY DEFAULT — add entries to author lore. Delete the example below freely.
_format.imagesAreURLs: Image blocks take a remote 'url' (https://...), NOT a local file. Hotlink any image you like.

entry.category: small grey label above the title, e.g. MAJOR POINT OF INTEREST / FIELD REPORT / ARCHIVE
entry.title: CARD TITLE
entry.icon: optional icon stem from img/icons (campaign_high_priority, campaign_defense, major_order, invasion, fac_automaton, ...)

body.text: Body copy. Inline markup: [c=#FFE900]yellow highlight[/c], **bold**, *italic*, [link=https://example.com]underlined link[/link].
A memorable line.
